name: Small Modular Reactor Cost
description: Estimated capital cost per watt of electrical capacity for small modular reactors (SMRs). Very few operational units exist; data is largely from engineering estimates, regulatory filings, and first-of-a-kind projects.

data_points.source: NEI/DOE — early SMR design estimates; NuScale initial cost projections $12-16/W range
NuScale Power — revised cost estimates for UAMPS Carbon Free Power Project, ~$6,100/kW ($6.1/W) target but independent estimates higher
IAEA Advances in SMR Technology Developments 2020 — estimated overnight costs for leading designs
MIT The Future of Nuclear Energy in a Carbon-Constrained World (updated estimates); Linglong One (China) construction costs
NEI/World Nuclear Association — estimates for nth-of-a-kind SMR: $4,000-6,500/kW range; NuScale CFPP cancellation at $9,300/kW illustrates first-of-a-kind challenges
DOE/Kairos Power, X-energy projections for HALEU-fueled designs; Chinese Linglong One nearing completion at lower costs
